subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — it was great meeting you at the conference, and we’d be glad to continue the conversation.

I’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call. Here are a few time windows that work on our side next week:

- April 21, 2026 from 14:00 to 16:00 (UTC)
- April 22, 2026 from 14:00 to 16:00 (UTC)
- April 23, 2026 from 14:00 to 16:00 (UTC)

Please let me know which of these slots works best for you, and we’ll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I’m not able to share internal email addresses or phone numbers. For information on engaging with our leadership team, please use the contact options provided on our public website, and we can coordinate senior-level participation through the usual channels.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Agent
